title: Borderlands Mobile Surprise Launch
details: Take-Two Interactive and Zynga have shadow-dropped 'Borderlands Mobile' on iOS—a brand-new experience built from the ground up for smartphones.
Experience a full story campaign, hunt for legendary loot, and take on bosses in mission types like Tower of Terror and Circle of Slaughter.
Progression involves developing your hub ship and mastering mobile-optimized gameplay with a signature art style and wild weapon variety.
PSA: While currently an iOS exclusive, Android support sections are already appearing on official pages, hinting at a global expansion soon.
